title: ehrharta longigluma
intro: Ehrharta longigluma is a species of grass in the family Poaceae, native to Australia, New Zealand, and other Pacific islands. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, known for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and combat infections. The health benefits of Ehrharta longigluma include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or topical ointment, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbal remedies to enhance its medicinal effects.
